items.title: The official logo for Notre Dame’s Shamrock Series game versus Wisconsin
items.summary: Here we go… just waiting on those uniforms. Notre Dame Releases Official Logo for 2026 Shamrock Series Game SOUTH BEND, Ind. – The 2026 Shamrock Series logo serves as a visual combination of the history of two storied football programs and one of the most iconic NFL stadiums for the upcoming clash between Notre Dame […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 3-Star OL Jackson Hill flips commitment from UCLA to the Irish
items.summary: On Thursday, a major recruiting move that has been in the works for weeks was finally made public. 3-Star offensive lineman, Jackson Hill, flipped his commitment from the UCLA Bruins to the Notre Dame Fighting Irish. “The 6-5, 280-pounder is ranked as the No. 103 offensive tackle in America and No. 142 overall player in […]

items.title: The 24 team playoff might be good for Notre Dame, but it’s bad for college football
items.summary: We have arrived at the point in the college football playoff timeline where we are now seriously considering the expansion of the format to 24 teams. It’s perhaps one of the most unsurprising storylines this offseason as so much of the college football landscape revolves almost completely around the CFP. This is wildly different than […]

items.title: Notre Dame Men’s Lacrosse Buries Jacksonville; Johns Hopkins is up Next
items.summary: On a beautiful and sunny Mother’s Day Sunday afternoon at Arlotta, the Notre Dame Men’s Lacrosse team came out ready to go. They played some complete lacrosse, beating the Jacksonville Dolphins by a final score of 18-5. The Fighting Irish advanced to the NCAA Quarterfinals for the fourth straight year and we will take on […]

items.title: Which ACC head coach hates Notre Dame the most?
items.summary: There is a giant target on the back of Notre Dame football right now, and the wolves are out for blood. No school generates as much animosity and conversation than Notre Dame, so it should come as no surprise that the combination is put on full display during the offseason. The events of last season […]

items.title: TRIPLE THREAT: Anthonie Knapp, Adon Shuler, and Mylan Graham
items.summary: Everyone loves to do a player countdown for Notre Dame as we face toward the college football season, but in all fairness, the offseason is much shorter than you think. It’s really only two months in the grand scheme of things, and there will be much more to talk about in the middle of July […]

items.title: Once again, Colin Cowherd is talking out of his sphincter when it comes to Notre Dame
items.summary: It’s a pretty toxic world out there, let’s cleanse it with the triple option. NOTRE DAME NOISE There is something about Notre Dame Football that makes people kind of crazy. In fact — they lose all sense of reality. Some don’t even pretend that they are living in reality. And that, my friends, is where […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 5-Star OL Oluwasemilore Olubobola commits to the Irish
items.summary: The Notre Dame Fighting Irish look to make a gigantic recruiting splash this week, and it all starts with an actual giant. During an announcement ceremony, 5-Star OL Oluwasemilore Olubobola gave his commitment to Notre Dame and its 2027 football recruiting class. Olu (as we humbly call him) chose the Irish over his other two […]
